description_long: This is a large, two-story white house with a flat and partially gabled roof, surrounded by a manicured green lawn and several tall palm trees. The structure features multiple rectangular windows arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, and a prominent main entryway with a rounded driveway in front. At the rear, there is a spacious patio area with a swimming pool, lounge chairs, and landscaped garden beds. The house includes an attached garage on one side and a secondary entrance visible from the side view. The exterior is finished in a smooth, light-colored material, likely stucco or painted concrete, with some glass elements for windows and doors. The overall design suggests a blend of Colonial and Mediterranean influences, with clean lines and a focus on outdoor living spaces.
description: A large, white two-story house with a flat and gabled roof, surrounded by palm trees, a pool, and a manicured lawn. Features include symmetrical windows, a rounded driveway, and an attached garage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, rounded driveway, symmetrical windows, and several palm trees framing the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the attached garage, secondary entrance, and a glimpse of the backyard pool area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the spacious patio, swimming pool, lounge area, and landscaped garden beds with palm trees.
description_view_3: Angled side-rear view showing the transition between the garage, patio, and pool area, with visible garden landscaping.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a rounded driveway, double doors, and minimal decorative elements, framed by palm trees and a small porch area.
